name: Mrs Fields Apricot Nectar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour and baking soda. Mix well with a wire whisk and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars with an electric mixer at medium speed until combined.
4. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste. Scrape down sides of the bowl.
5. Add egg, apricot nectar, and apricot preserves; beat at medium speed until smooth.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture and dried apricots, blending on low just until combined. Do not overmix.
7. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, 1-1/2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 22-24 minutes or until cookies begin to brown at the bottom edges.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a cool flat surface with a spatula.
